input.contract_text:
MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Master Services Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on March 15, 2024 (the "Effective Date") by and between Acme Corp, a Delaware corporation ("Customer"), and Initech Systems, Inc., a California corporation ("Vendor").

1. TERM. The initial term of this Agreement is twenty-four (24) months from the Effective Date. This Agreement shall automatically renew for successive one-year terms unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least sixty (60) days prior to the end of the then-current term.

2. FEES. Customer shall pay Vendor the fees set forth in Schedule A.

3. TERMINATION. Either party may terminate this Agreement for material breach upon thirty (30) days written notice and opportunity to cure. Customer may terminate for convenience upon ninety (90) days written notice with a 50% early termination fee.

4. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY. EXCEPT FOR BREACHES OF CONFIDENTIALITY AND INDEMNIFICATION OBLIGATIONS, EACH PARTY'S TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE FEES PAID BY CUSTOMER IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRIOR TO THE CLAIM. IN NO EVENT SHALL EITHER PARTY BE LIABLE FOR CONSEQUENTIAL OR INDIRECT DAMAGES.

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY. All pre-existing IP remains with its owner. Deliverables created specifically for Customer shall be owned by Customer upon full payment. Vendor retains rights to general tools, methodologies, and know-how.

SOFTWARE LICENSE AND MAINTENANCE AGREEMENT

Effective 1 January 2025, Globex International Ltd ("Licensor") grants to Umbrella Co ("Licensee") a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to the Globex Platform.

TERM: Perpetual license. Maintenance term: three (3) years, renewing automatically for one-year terms unless cancelled with 30 days notice.

FEES: License fee of USD 500,000. Annual maintenance fee of 22% of then-current list price.

LIABILITY: LICENSOR'S LIABILITY IS UNLIMITED WITH RESPECT TO DIRECT DAMAGES. Licensee waives all claims for incidental damages.

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY: All intellectual property, including any modifications, feedback, and derivative works, shall be the sole property of Licensor. Licensee assigns all right, title, and interest in feedback to Licensor.

TERMINATION: Licensor may terminate immediately upon any breach. Licensee has no right to terminate.

CONSULTING AGREEMENT

This Consulting Agreement is made as of April 1, 2024, between Wayne Enterprises ("Company") and Dr. Jane Doe ("Consultant").

SERVICES: Consultant shall provide advisory services on request.

TERM: This Agreement begins on the date above and continues for six (6) months. No automatic renewal.

FEES: $5,000 per month, invoiced monthly.

TERMINATION: Either party may terminate at any time on fourteen (14) days notice.

LIABILITY: Consultant's total liability is capped at fees received in the prior three (3) months.

WORK PRODUCT: Any work product created specifically under this Agreement is owned by Company.

DATA PROCESSING ADDENDUM

Between Stark Industries, Inc. (Data Controller) and Pied Piper LLC (Data Processor), effective January 10, 2025.

1. Scope. This DPA governs processing of personal data as described in Exhibit A.

2. Subprocessors. Processor may engage subprocessors with 10 days prior notice; Controller may object, and if objection cannot be resolved in 30 days, Controller may terminate the underlying services agreement without penalty.

3. Security. Processor shall maintain SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications throughout the term.

4. Breach notification. Processor shall notify Controller within 24 hours of confirmed breach affecting Controller personal data.

5. Audit rights. Controller may audit once per year with 30 days notice, or more frequently in the event of a breach.

6. Term. Coterminous with the underlying MSA. No automatic renewal separate from the MSA.

7. Indemnity. Processor indemnifies Controller for regulatory fines directly attributable to Processor's breach of this DPA.

MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This NDA is entered into on 7/22/2024 between the parties identified below.

Party A: Hooli, Inc.
Party B: Bluth Company LLC

1. Confidential Information means any non-public technical, business, or financial information disclosed by either party.

2. Obligations. Each party shall protect the other's Confidential Information for a period of five (5) years from disclosure.

3. Term. This NDA remains in effect for two (2) years from the date above, and the confidentiality obligations survive termination for the period stated in Section 2.

4. No license. Nothing here grants any license or IP rights.

5. Equitable relief. Either party may seek injunctive relief without posting bond.
